entities.girl: a girl in a yellow dress
entities.boy: a boy in a blue cap

scenes.title: The Playground
scenes.background_prompt: A colorful playground on a sunny day with a swing set, a wooden bench, a slide, and a sandbox filled with toys. Green grass, a few trees, blue sky with white clouds. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A colorful playground on a sunny day. A girl in a bright yellow dress with white shoes swings happily on a swing set to the left. A boy wearing a blue baseball cap, a striped t-shirt, and brown shorts sits quietly on a wooden bench in the center, resting his chin on his hands. A medium-sized brown dog with floppy ears lies lazily under the slide to the right, its head resting on its paws. In the foreground, a sandbox filled with colorful plastic toys — a red bucket, a blue shovel, and a green mold — sits near the bench. The background shows green grass, a few leafy trees, and a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl on the swing set (left), swinging with legs extended. Place boy on the wooden bench (center), sitting with chin resting on hands, looking slightly bored. Place dog under the slide (right), lying down with head on paws.
scenes.scene_description: In the lower foreground, a green lawn is dotted with small white, yellow, and pink flowers. A grey stone path curves from the left side toward the center of the scene. On the left side of the midground, a green metal swing set stands with two swings. A girl with brown hair in pigtails, decorated with blue flowers, sits on the right swing wearing a yellow dress with white polka dots, white socks, and blue shoes. To her right, a boy sits on a brown wooden bench; he wears a blue cap, a yellow and green striped shirt, brown pants, and brown boots, resting his chin on his hands. Behind the bench is a large, leafy green tree. To the right of the boy, a playground slide with a yellow chute, red railings, and a green ladder stands on a red and blue padded surface. A brown dog lies sleeping on the ground next to the slide. Further to the right, a square wooden sandbox is filled with sand and contains a blue toy truck, a red bucket with a blue shovel, a green starfish, a red cup, and a small sandcastle. In the background, green bushes and rolling hills stretch across the horizon. A short wooden picket fence is located behind the sandbox, next to another large green tree on the far right. The sky above is light blue, filled with several white fluffy clouds and a bright yellow sun shining in the upper center.
